_comment: Windows + Intel Arc end-to-end detect pipeline: capture_file -> decode_ffmpeg
(RGB24) -> detect_onnx running YOLO on the GPU via the ONNX Runtime DirectML
execution provider (ep="dml", DX12). Set ep="cpu" to fall back to the CPU EP.
Runtime deployment note: detect_onnx.dll needs onnxruntime.dll AND a matching
DirectML.dll next to the LOADING EXE (zm-core.exe), because Windows searches the
exe directory + System32 before the plugin's own folder -- otherwise the inbox
System32 onnxruntime.dll is loaded and the version mismatches. Use the DirectML
version the ORT build pins (e.g. ORT 1.20.x -> DirectML 1.15.2).
Copy to pipelines/<name>.json and fill in real paths (that copy is gitignored).
frame_width/frame_height MUST match the decoded frame size.
name: e2e_dml_detect
